subcodes.first_line: O dear friend, thou art ever present in 'Abdu'l-Bahá's thoughts; nay, rather, thou art before Him in person, thy image before His sight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز همیشه در خاطر عبدالبهاءای بلکه در محضر حاضر تمثال تو در پیش بصر
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @belief and denial, @development of capacity and readiness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
